import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x <= v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
while j < sorted.len()
  match sorted.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    if j == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(out)
